lines.speaker: Sekyu
lines.text: Hold up, Kid. Where’s your application form? This area is restricted to editorial staff only.

lines.speaker: Kiko
lines.text: Oh! I have it! Enzo signed me up!

lines.speaker: Sekyu
lines.text: Your form is not signed. The Paragon has rules.

lines.speaker: Sekyu
lines.text: If I let you in now, the admin will have my badge. Go get it signed by the Editor-in-Chief.

lines.speaker: Sekyu
lines.text: Just.. go get the form signed kid. it’s as easy as that.

lines.speaker: Kiko
lines.text: Great… I haven't even stepped inside, and I'm already failing. Okay... let’s look for Enzo...

lines.speaker: Sekyu
lines.text: Sorry bud, no form, no entry..

lines.speaker: Sekyu
lines.text: Alright, rookie. You look like you belong now. Go on in.

lines.speaker: Sekyu
lines.text: Keep your nose clean in there, kid.

lines.speaker: Sekyu
lines.text: Move along, nothing to see here.
